# tf_test

*This page will be auto-generated by stardoc.*

Run Terraform native tests (`.tftest.hcl`) against a module.

```starlark
load("@rules_tf2//tf2:def.bzl", "tf_test")

tf_test(
    name = "my_test",
    module = ":my_module",
    test_files = ["main.tftest.hcl"],
)
```

See [Rules Overview](README.md) for more information.
